<includeonly>{{Sidebar with collapsible lists | name = Philosophy of religion sidebar | class = hlist | pretitle = Part of [[:Category:Philosophy of religion|a series]] on the | titlestyle = display:block;margin-bottom:0.4em; | title = [[Philosophy of religion]] | listtitlestyle = background:#ddf;text-align:center; | liststyle = padding-left:0.35em;padding-right:0.35em; | expanded =
<!------------------ Religious concepts -------------------> | list1name = religion | list1title = [[Religion|Religious]] concepts | list1 = * [[Afterlife]] * [[Apophatic theology|Apophatism]] * [[Cataphatic theology|Cataphatism]] * [[Eschatology]] * [[Enlightenment in Buddhism|Enlightenment]] * [[Intelligent design]] * [[Moksha|Liberation]] * [[Miracle]] * [[Mysticism]] * [[Belief#Religion|{{wrap|Religious belief}}]] * [[Reincarnation]] * [[Faith|Religious faith]] * [[Religious text|{{wrap|Scripture (religious text)}}]] * [[Soul]] * [[Vitalism|Spirit]] * [[Theological veto]]
<!---------------------- Challenges -----------------------> | list2name = challenges | list2title = Challenges | list2style = padding-bottom:0;<!--(subsidebar)--> | list2 = {{Sidebar |child |bodystyle={{subsidebar bodystyle}} |navbar=off | headingstyle = background:#e6e6ff;<!--(to complement listtitlestyle above)--> font-weight:normal;<!--(to distinguish from listtitlestyle above)--> | contentstyle = padding:0.15em 0.3em 0.6em;<!--(otherwise too close to headings)--> | content1 = * [[Ethical egoism]] * [[Euthyphro dilemma]] * [[Logical positivism]] * [[Problem of religious language|Religious language]] * [[Verificationism]] ** [[Eschatological verification|eschatological]]
| heading2 = [[Problem of evil]] | content2 = * [[Theodicy]] ** [[Augustinian theodicy|Augustinian]] ** [[Irenaean theodicy|Irenaean]] * [[Best of all possible worlds|{{wrap|Best of all possible worlds}}]] * [[Inconsistent triad]] * [[Natural evil]] }}
<!------------------------- God ---------------------------> | list3name = God | list3title = [[God]] | list3style = padding-bottom:0;<!--(as above; etc)--> | list3 = {{Sidebar |child |bodystyle={{subsidebar bodystyle}} |navbar=off | headingstyle = background:#e6e6ff;font-weight:normal;<!--(as above; etc)--> | contentstyle = padding:0.15em 0.5em 0.6em;<!--(as above; etc)-->
| heading1 = [[Conceptions of God|Conceptions]] | content1 = * [[Anthropopathism]] * [[Brahman]] * [[Demiurge]] * [[Divine simplicity|Divinely simple]] * [[Form of the Good]] * [[Holy Spirit]] * [[Misotheism|Maltheist]] * [[Occasionalism]] * [[Pandeism|Pandeist]] * [[Personal god|Personal]] * [[Process theology|Process-theological]] * [[Summum bonum]] * [[Creator deity|Supreme Being]] * [[Unmoved mover]]
| heading2 = [[Existence of God|Existence]] | content2 = {{Sidebar |child |bodystyle={{subsidebar bodystyle}} |navbar=off | headingstyle = <!--background:#eef;-->font-weight:normal; | contentstyle = padding-left:0.4em;padding-right:0.4em; | heading1 = Arguments for | content1 = * [[Argument from beauty|Beauty]] * [[Christological argument|Christological]] ** [[Lewis's trilemma|Trilemma]] ** [[Resurrection of Jesus|Resurrection]] * [[Argument from consciousness|Consciousness]] * [[Cosmological argument|Cosmological]] ** ''[[Kalam cosmological argument|kalām]]'' ** [[Cosmological argument#Argument from contingency|contingency]] ** [[Cosmological argument#Metaphysical argument for the existence of God|metaphysical]] * [[Argument from degree|Degree]] * [[Argument from desire|Desire]] * [[Argument from religious experience|Experience]] * [[Leap of faith|Existential choice]] * [[Fine-tuned universe]] * [[Argument from love|Love]] * [[Mathematics and God|Mathematics]] * [[Argument from miracles|Miracles]] * [[Argument from morality|Morality]] * [[George Berkeley#Theology|Mystical idealism]] * [[Natural-law argument|Natural law]] * [[Proof of the Truthful|Necessary existent]] ** [[Seddiqin argument|Seddiqin]] * [[Nyayakusumanjali]] * [[Occam's razor#Religion|Occam's Razor]] * [[Ontological argument|Ontological]] ** [[Gödel's ontological proof|Gödel]] ** [[Ontological argument#Modal versions of the ontological argument|Modal]] ** [[Proslogion|Anselm]] ** [[Meinongian argument|Meinongian]] ** [[Transcendent theosophy|Mulla Sadra]] ** [[Baruch Spinoza#Ontological argument|Spinoza]] * [[Pascal's wager]] * [[Reformed epistemology|Proper basis / Reformed epistemology]] * [[Argument from reason|Reason]] * [[Religious responses to the problem of evil|Responses to evil]] * [[Teleological argument|Teleological]] ** [[Intelligent design]] ** [[Watchmaker analogy|Watchmaker]] *** [[Junkyard tornado|Junkyard]] * [[Trademark argument|Trademark]] * [[Transcendental argument for the existence of God|Transcendental]] | heading2 = Arguments against | content2 = * [[Ultimate Boeing 747 gambit|747 gambit]] * [[Atheist's wager]] * [[Problem of the creator of God|Creator of God]] * [[Problem of evil|Evil]] * [[Evil God challenge|Evil God]] * [[Fate of the unlearned]] * [[Argument from free will|Free will]] * [[God of the gaps]] * [[Problem of Hell|Hell]] * [[Hitchens's razor]] * [[Incompatible-properties argument|Incompatible properties]] * [[Argument from inconsistent revelations|{{wrap|Inconsistency}}]] * No limits fallacy * [[Argument from nonbelief|Nonbelief]] * [[Theological noncognitivism|Noncognitivism]] * [[Omnipotence paradox|{{wrap|Omnipotence paradox}}]] * [[Argument from poor design|Poor design]] * [[Russell's teapot]] }}
| heading3 = By religion | content3 = * [[God in Abrahamic religions|Abrahamic]] ** [[God in the Baháʼí Faith|Baháʼí]] ** [[God in Christianity|Christianity]] ** [[God in Islam|Islam]] ** [[God in Judaism|Judaism]] ** [[God in Mormonism|Mormonism]] ** [[Hayyi Rabbi|Mandaeism]] * [[Creator in Buddhism|Buddhism]] * [[God in Hinduism|Hinduism]] * [[God in Jainism|Jainism]] * [[God in Sikhism|Sikhism]] * [[Wiccan views of divinity|Wicca]] }}
<!----------------------- Theories ------------------------> | list4name = theories | list4title = [[Theories about religion|Theories of religion]] | list4 = * [[Acosmism]] * [[Agnosticism]] * [[Animism]] * [[Antireligion]] * [[Atheism]] * [[Creationism]] * [[Dharma|Dharmism]] * [[Deism]] * [[Divine command theory]] * [[Dualism in cosmology|Dualism]] * [[Western esotericism|Esotericism]] * [[Exclusivism]] * [[Existentialism]] ** [[Atheistic existentialism|atheist]] ** [[Christian existentialism|Christian]] * [[Feminist theology|Feminist]] * [[Fundamentalism]] * [[Gnosticism]] * [[Henotheism]] * [[Humanism]] ** [[Christian humanism|Christian]] ** [[Religious humanism|religious]] ** [[Secular humanism|secular]] * [[Inclusivism]] * [[Monism]] * [[Monotheism]] * [[Mysticism]] * [[Naturalism (philosophy)|Naturalism]] ** [[Humanistic naturalism|humanistic]] ** [[Metaphysical naturalism|metaphysical]] ** [[Religious naturalism|religious]] * [[New Age]] * [[Nonduality (spirituality)|Nondualism]] * [[Nontheism]] * [[Pandeism]] * [[Panentheism]] * [[Pantheism]] * [[Perennial philosophy|Perennialism]] * [[Polytheism]] * [[Process theology|Process]] * [[Secular Shrine Theory]] * [[Shendao shejiao]] * [[Spiritualism (beliefs)|Spiritualism]] * [[Shamanism]] * [[East Asian religions|Taoic]] * [[Theism]] * [[Transcendentalism]]
<!--------------------- Philosophers ----------------------> | list5name = philosophers | list5title = [[:Category:Philosophers of religion|Philosophers of religion]] | list5style = padding-bottom:0; | list5 = {{Sidebar |child |bodystyle={{subsidebar bodystyle}} |navbar=off | headingstyle = background:#e6e6ff;font-weight:normal; | contentstyle = padding:0.1em 1.25em 0.6em; <!-- Check: "[X]ist philosophers" / "[X]ism philosophers" -->
| heading1 = [[Ancient Greek philosophy|Ancient]] and [[Medieval philosophy|medieval]] | content1 = * [[Anselm of Canterbury]] * [[Augustine of Hippo]] * [[Avicenna]] * [[Averroes]] * [[Boethius]] * [[Gaudapada]] * [[Al-Ghazali]] * [[Gaunilo of Marmoutiers]] * [[Giovanni Pico della Mirandola|Pico della Mirandola]] * [[Heraclitus]] * [[James VI and I|King James VI and I]] * [[Marcion of Sinope]] * [[Maimonides]] * [[Adi Shankara]] * [[Thomas Aquinas]] * [[William of Ockham]]
| heading2 = [[Early modern philosophy|Early modern]] | content2 = * [[Antoine Augustin Calmet|Augustin Calmet]] * [[René Descartes]] * [[Blaise Pascal]] * [[Desiderius Erasmus]] * [[Baruch Spinoza]] * [[Nicolas Malebranche]] * [[Gottfried Wilhelm Leibniz|Gottfried W Leibniz]] * [[William Wollaston]] * [[Thomas Chubb]] * [[David Hume]] * [[Baron d'Holbach]] * [[Immanuel Kant]] * [[Johann Gottfried Herder|Johann G Herder]]
| heading3 = [[19th-century philosophy|19th-century]] | content3 = * [[Friedrich Schleiermacher]] * [[Karl Christian Friedrich Krause|Karl C F Krause]] * [[Georg Wilhelm Friedrich Hegel|Georg W F Hegel]] * [[Thomas Carlyle]] * [[William Whewell]] * [[Ludwig Feuerbach]] * [[Søren Kierkegaard]] * [[Karl Marx]] * [[Albrecht Ritschl]] * [[Afrikan Spir]] * [[Usman dan Fodio]] * [[Ernst Haeckel]] * [[William Kingdon Clifford|W K Clifford]] * [[Friedrich Nietzsche]] * [[Harald Høffding]] * [[William James]] * [[Vladimir Solovyov (philosopher)|Vladimir Solovyov]] * [[Ernst Troeltsch]] * [[Rudolf Otto]] * [[Lev Shestov]] * [[Ernst Cassirer]] * [[Joseph Maréchal]]
| heading5 = [[Contemporary philosophy|Contemporary]] | content5 = * [[George Santayana]] * [[Bertrand Russell]] * [[Martin Buber]] * [[Sergei Bulgakov]] * [[René Guénon]] * [[Paul Tillich]] * [[Karl Barth]] * [[Pavel Florensky]] * [[Emil Brunner]] * [[Rudolf Bultmann]] * [[Gabriel Marcel]] * [[Reinhold Niebuhr]]
* [[Charles Hartshorne]] * [[Mircea Eliade]] * [[Frithjof Schuon]] * [[J. L. Mackie]] * [[Walter Kaufmann (philosopher)|Walter Kaufmann]] * [[Martin Lings]] * [[Peter Geach]] * [[George I. Mavrodes|George I Mavrodes]] * [[William Alston]] * [[Antony Flew]] * [[Kurt Godel]] * [[Graham Oppy]] * [[J. L. Schellenberg]] * [[Paul Draper (philosopher)|Paul Draper]] * [[William L. Rowe|William L Rowe]] * [[Dewi Zephaniah Phillips|Dewi Z Phillips]] * [[Alvin Plantinga]] * [[Anthony Kenny]] * [[Nicholas Wolterstorff]] * [[Richard Swinburne]] * [[Robert Merrihew Adams]] * [[Ravi Zacharias]] * [[Peter van Inwagen]] * [[Cornel West]] * [[Loyal Rue]] * [[Herman Philipse]] * [[Kai Nielsen (philosopher)|Kai Nielsen]] * [[Jean-Luc Marion]] * [[William Lane Craig]] * [[Ali Akbar Rashad]] * [[Yujin Nagasawa]] * [[Alexander Pruss]] }}
<!----------------------- Related -------------------------> | list6name = related | list6title = Related topics | list6class = wraplinks | list6 = * [[Criticism of religion]] * [[Ethics in religion]] * [[Exegesis]] * [[Faith and rationality]] * [[History of religion]]s * [[Natural theology]] * [[Relationship between religion and science|Religion and science]] * [[Religious philosophy]] * [[Theology]]
| below = [[Index of philosophy of religion articles|Philosophy of religion article index]]
}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} [[Category:Philosophy and thinking sidebar templates]] </noinclude>

| heading2 = [[Existence of God|Existence]] | content2 = {{Sidebar |child |bodystyle={{subsidebar bodystyle}} |navbar=off | headingstyle = <!--background:#eef;-->font-weight:normal; | contentstyle = padding-left:0.4em;padding-right:0.4em; | heading1 = Arguments for | content1 = * [[Argument from beauty|Beauty]] * [[Christological argument|Christological]] ** [[Lewis's trilemma|Trilemma]] ** [[Resurrection of Jesus|Resurrection]] * [[Argument from consciousness|Consciousness]] * [[Cosmological argument|Cosmological]] ** ''[[Kalam cosmological argument|kalām]]'' ** [[Cosmological argument#Argument from contingency|contingency]] ** [[Cosmological argument#Metaphysical argument for the existence of God|metaphysical]] * [[Argument from degree|Degree]] * [[Argument from desire|Desire]] * [[Argument from religious experience|Experience]] * [[Leap of faith|Existential choice]] * [[Fine-tuned universe]] * [[Argument from love|Love]] * [[Mathematics and God|Mathematics]] * [[Argument from miracles|Miracles]] * [[Argument from morality|Morality]] * [[George Berkeley#Theology|Mystical idealism]] * [[Natural-law argument|Natural law]] * [[Proof of the Truthful|Necessary existent]] ** [[Seddiqin argument|Seddiqin]] * [[Nyayakusumanjali]] * [[Occam's razor#Religion|Occam's Razor]] * [[Ontological argument|Ontological]] ** [[Gödel's ontological proof|Gödel]] ** [[Ontological argument#Modal versions of the ontological argument|Modal]] ** [[Proslogion|Anselm]] ** [[Meinongian argument|Meinongian]] ** [[Transcendent theosophy|Mulla Sadra]] ** [[Baruch Spinoza#Ontological argument|Spinoza]] * [[Pascal's wager]] * [[Reformed epistemology|Proper basis / Reformed epistemology]] * [[Argument from reason|Reason]] * [[Religious responses to the problem of evil|Responses to evil]] * [[Teleological argument|Teleological]] ** [[Intelligent design]] ** [[Watchmaker analogy|Watchmaker]] *** [[Junkyard tornado|Junkyard]] * [[Trademark argument|Trademark]] * [[Transcendental argument for the existence of God|Transcendental]] | heading2 = Arguments against | content2 = * [[Ultimate Boeing 747 gambit|747 gambit]] * [[Atheist's wager]] * [[Problem of the creator of God|Creator of God]] * [[Problem of evil|Evil]] * [[Evil God challenge|Evil God]] * [[Fate of the unlearned]] * [[Argument from free will|Free will]] * [[God of the gaps]] * [[Problem of Hell|Hell]] * [[Hitchens's razor]] * [[Incompatible-properties argument|Incompatible properties]] * [[Argument from inconsistent revelations|{{wrap|Inconsistency}}]] * No limits fallacy * [[Argument from nonbelief|Nonbelief]] * [[Theological noncognitivism|Noncognitivism]] * [[Omnipotence paradox|{{wrap|Omnipotence paradox}}]] * [[Argument from poor design|Poor design]] * [[Russell's teapot]] }}
| heading3 = By religion | content3 = * [[God in Abrahamic religions|Abrahamic]] ** [[God in the Baháʼí Faith|Baháʼí]] ** [[God in Christianity|Christianity]] ** [[God in Islam|Islam]] ** [[God in Judaism|Judaism]] ** [[God in Mormonism|Mormonism]] ** [[Hayyi Rabbi|Mandaeism]] * [[Creator in Buddhism|Buddhism]] * [[God in Hinduism|Hinduism]] * [[God in Jainism|Jainism]] * [[God in Sikhism|Sikhism]] * [[Wiccan views of divinity|Wicca]] }}

<!------------------ Religious concepts -------------------> | list1name = religion | list1title = [[Religion|Religious]] concepts | list1 = * [[Afterlife]] * [[Apophatic theology|Apophatism]] * [[Cataphatic theology|Cataphatism]] * [[Eschatology]] * [[Enlightenment in Buddhism|Enlightenment]] * [[Intelligent design]] * [[Moksha|Liberation]] * [[Miracle]] * [[Mysticism]] * [[Belief#Religion|{{wrap|Religious belief}}]] * [[Reincarnation]] * [[Faith|Religious faith]] * [[Religious text|{{wrap|Scripture (religious text)}}]] * [[Soul]] * [[Vitalism|Spirit]] * [[Theological veto]]
<!---------------------- Challenges -----------------------> | list2name = challenges | list2title = Challenges | list2style = padding-bottom:0;<!--(subsidebar)--> | list2 = {{Sidebar |child |bodystyle={{subsidebar bodystyle}} |navbar=off | headingstyle = background:#e6e6ff;<!--(to complement listtitlestyle above)--> font-weight:normal;<!--(to distinguish from listtitlestyle above)--> | contentstyle = padding:0.15em 0.3em 0.6em;<!--(otherwise too close to headings)--> | content1 = * [[Ethical egoism]] * [[Euthyphro dilemma]] * [[Logical positivism]] * [[Problem of religious language|Religious language]] * [[Verificationism]] ** [[Eschatological verification|eschatological]]
| heading2 = [[Problem of evil]] | content2 = * [[Theodicy]] ** [[Augustinian theodicy|Augustinian]] ** [[Irenaean theodicy|Irenaean]] * [[Best of all possible worlds|{{wrap|Best of all possible worlds}}]] * [[Inconsistent triad]] * [[Natural evil]] }}
<!------------------------- God ---------------------------> | list3name = God | list3title = [[God]] | list3style = padding-bottom:0;<!--(as above; etc)--> | list3 = {{Sidebar |child |bodystyle={{subsidebar bodystyle}} |navbar=off | headingstyle = background:#e6e6ff;font-weight:normal;<!--(as above; etc)--> | contentstyle = padding:0.15em 0.5em 0.6em;<!--(as above; etc)-->
| heading1 = [[Conceptions of God|Conceptions]] | content1 = * [[Anthropopathism]] * [[Brahman]] * [[Demiurge]] * [[Divine simplicity|Divinely simple]] * [[Form of the Good]] * [[Holy Spirit]] * [[Misotheism|Maltheist]] * [[Occasionalism]] * [[Pandeism|Pandeist]] * [[Personal god|Personal]] * [[Process theology|Process-theological]] * [[Summum bonum]] * [[Creator deity|Supreme Being]] * [[Unmoved mover]]
| heading2 = [[Existence of God|Existence]] | content2 = {{Sidebar |child |bodystyle={{subsidebar bodystyle}} |navbar=off | headingstyle = <!--background:#eef;-->font-weight:normal; | contentstyle = padding-left:0.4em;padding-right:0.4em; | heading1 = Arguments for | content1 = * [[Argument from beauty|Beauty]] * [[Christological argument|Christological]] ** [[Lewis's trilemma|Trilemma]] ** [[Resurrection of Jesus|Resurrection]] * [[Argument from consciousness|Consciousness]] * [[Cosmological argument|Cosmological]] ** ''[[Kalam cosmological argument|kalām]]'' ** [[Cosmological argument#Argument from contingency|contingency]] ** [[Cosmological argument#Metaphysical argument for the existence of God|metaphysical]] * [[Argument from degree|Degree]] * [[Argument from desire|Desire]] * [[Argument from religious experience|Experience]] * [[Leap of faith|Existential choice]] * [[Fine-tuned universe]] * [[Argument from love|Love]] * [[Mathematics and God|Mathematics]] * [[Argument from miracles|Miracles]] * [[Argument from morality|Morality]] * [[George Berkeley#Theology|Mystical idealism]] * [[Natural-law argument|Natural law]] * [[Proof of the Truthful|Necessary existent]] ** [[Seddiqin argument|Seddiqin]] * [[Nyayakusumanjali]] * [[Occam's razor#Religion|Occam's Razor]] * [[Ontological argument|Ontological]] ** [[Gödel's ontological proof|Gödel]] ** [[Ontological argument#Modal versions of the ontological argument|Modal]] ** [[Proslogion|Anselm]] ** [[Meinongian argument|Meinongian]] ** [[Transcendent theosophy|Mulla Sadra]] ** [[Baruch Spinoza#Ontological argument|Spinoza]] * [[Pascal's wager]] * [[Reformed epistemology|Proper basis / Reformed epistemology]] * [[Argument from reason|Reason]] * [[Religious responses to the problem of evil|Responses to evil]] * [[Teleological argument|Teleological]] ** [[Intelligent design]] ** [[Watchmaker analogy|Watchmaker]] *** [[Junkyard tornado|Junkyard]] * [[Trademark argument|Trademark]] * [[Transcendental argument for the existence of God|Transcendental]] | heading2 = Arguments against | content2 = * [[Ultimate Boeing 747 gambit|747 gambit]] * [[Atheist's wager]] * [[Problem of the creator of God|Creator of God]] * [[Problem of evil|Evil]] * [[Evil God challenge|Evil God]] * [[Fate of the unlearned]] * [[Argument from free will|Free will]] * [[God of the gaps]] * [[Problem of Hell|Hell]] * [[Hitchens's razor]] * [[Incompatible-properties argument|Incompatible properties]] * [[Argument from inconsistent revelations|{{wrap|Inconsistency}}]] * No limits fallacy * [[Argument from nonbelief|Nonbelief]] * [[Theological noncognitivism|Noncognitivism]] * [[Omnipotence paradox|{{wrap|Omnipotence paradox}}]] * [[Argument from poor design|Poor design]] * [[Russell's teapot]] }}
| heading3 = By religion | content3 = * [[God in Abrahamic religions|Abrahamic]] ** [[God in the Baháʼí Faith|Baháʼí]] ** [[God in Christianity|Christianity]] ** [[God in Islam|Islam]] ** [[God in Judaism|Judaism]] ** [[God in Mormonism|Mormonism]] ** [[Hayyi Rabbi|Mandaeism]] * [[Creator in Buddhism|Buddhism]] * [[God in Hinduism|Hinduism]] * [[God in Jainism|Jainism]] * [[God in Sikhism|Sikhism]] * [[Wiccan views of divinity|Wicca]] }}
<!----------------------- Theories ------------------------> | list4name = theories | list4title = [[Theories about religion|Theories of religion]] | list4 = * [[Acosmism]] * [[Agnosticism]] * [[Animism]] * [[Antireligion]] * [[Atheism]] * [[Creationism]] * [[Dharma|Dharmism]] * [[Deism]] * [[Divine command theory]] * [[Dualism in cosmology|Dualism]] * [[Western esotericism|Esotericism]] * [[Exclusivism]] * [[Existentialism]] ** [[Atheistic existentialism|atheist]] ** [[Christian existentialism|Christian]] * [[Feminist theology|Feminist]] * [[Fundamentalism]] * [[Gnosticism]] * [[Henotheism]] * [[Humanism]] ** [[Christian humanism|Christian]] ** [[Religious humanism|religious]] ** [[Secular humanism|secular]] * [[Inclusivism]] * [[Monism]] * [[Monotheism]] * [[Mysticism]] * [[Naturalism (philosophy)|Naturalism]] ** [[Humanistic naturalism|humanistic]] ** [[Metaphysical naturalism|metaphysical]] ** [[Religious naturalism|religious]] * [[New Age]] * [[Nonduality (spirituality)|Nondualism]] * [[Nontheism]] * [[Pandeism]] * [[Panentheism]] * [[Pantheism]] * [[Perennial philosophy|Perennialism]] * [[Polytheism]] * [[Process theology|Process]] * [[Secular Shrine Theory]] * [[Shendao shejiao]] * [[Spiritualism (beliefs)|Spiritualism]] * [[Shamanism]] * [[East Asian religions|Taoic]] * [[Theism]] * [[Transcendentalism]]
<!--------------------- Philosophers ----------------------> | list5name = philosophers | list5title = [[:Category:Philosophers of religion|Philosophers of religion]] | list5style = padding-bottom:0; | list5 = {{Sidebar |child |bodystyle={{subsidebar bodystyle}} |navbar=off | headingstyle = background:#e6e6ff;font-weight:normal; | contentstyle = padding:0.1em 1.25em 0.6em; <!-- Check: "[X]ist philosophers" / "[X]ism philosophers" -->
| heading1 = [[:en:Ancient Greek philosophy|Ancient]] and [[Medieval philosophy|medieval]] | content1 = * [[Anselm of Canterbury]] * [[Augustine of Hippo]] * [[Avicenna]] * [[Averroes]] * [[Boethius]] * [[Gaudapada]] * [[:en:Al-Ghazali|Al-Ghazali]] * [[Gaunilo of Marmoutiers]] * [[Giovanni Pico della Mirandola|Pico della Mirandola]] * [[Heraclitus]] * [[James VI and I|King James VI and I]] * [[Marcion of Sinope]] * [[Maimonides]] * [[Adi Shankara]] * [[Thomas Aquinas]] * [[William of Ockham]]
| heading2 = [[Early modern philosophy|Early modern]] | content2 = * [[Antoine Augustin Calmet|Augustin Calmet]] * [[René Descartes]] * [[Blaise Pascal]] * [[Desiderius Erasmus]] * [[Baruch Spinoza]] * [[Nicolas Malebranche]] * [[Gottfried Wilhelm Leibniz|Gottfried W Leibniz]] * [[William Wollaston]] * [[Thomas Chubb]] * [[David Hume]] * [[Baron d'Holbach]] * [[Immanuel Kant]] * [[Johann Gottfried Herder|Johann G Herder]]
| heading3 = [[19th-century philosophy|19th-century]] | content3 = * [[Friedrich Schleiermacher]] * [[Karl Christian Friedrich Krause|Karl C F Krause]] * [[Georg Wilhelm Friedrich Hegel|Georg W F Hegel]] * [[Thomas Carlyle]] * [[William Whewell]] * [[Ludwig Feuerbach]] * [[Søren Kierkegaard]] * [[Karl Marx]] * [[:en:Albrecht Ritschl|Albrecht Ritschl]] * [[Afrikan Spir]] * [[Usman dan Fodio]] * [[Ernst Haeckel]] * [[William Kingdon Clifford|W K Clifford]] * [[Friedrich Nietzsche]] * [[Harald Høffding]] * [[William James]] * [[Vladimir Solovyov (philosopher)|Vladimir Solovyov]] * [[Ernst Troeltsch]] * [[Rudolf Otto]] * [[Lev Shestov]] * [[Ernst Cassirer]] * [[Joseph Maréchal]]
| heading5 = [[Contemporary philosophy|Contemporary]] | content5 = * [[George Santayana]] * [[Bertrand Russell]] * [[Martin Buber]] * [[Sergei Bulgakov]] * [[René Guénon]] * [[Paul Tillich]] * [[Karl Barth]] * [[Pavel Florensky]] * [[Emil Brunner]] * [[Rudolf Bultmann]] * [[Gabriel Marcel]] * [[Reinhold Niebuhr]]
* [[Charles Hartshorne]] * [[Mircea Eliade]] * [[Frithjof Schuon]] * [[J. L. Mackie]] * [[Walter Kaufmann (philosopher)|Walter Kaufmann]] * [[Martin Lings]] * [[Peter Geach]] * [[George I. Mavrodes|George I Mavrodes]] * [[William Alston]] * [[Antony Flew]] * [[Kurt Godel]] * [[Graham Oppy]] * [[J. L. Schellenberg]] * [[Paul Draper (philosopher)|Paul Draper]] * [[William L. Rowe|William L Rowe]] * [[Dewi Zephaniah Phillips|Dewi Z Phillips]] * [[:en:Alvin Plantinga|Alvin Plantinga]] * [[Anthony Kenny]] * [[Nicholas Wolterstorff]] * [[Richard Swinburne]] * [[Robert Merrihew Adams]] * [[Ravi Zacharias]] * [[Peter van Inwagen]] * [[Cornel West]] * [[Loyal Rue]] * [[Herman Philipse]] * [[Kai Nielsen (philosopher)|Kai Nielsen]] * [[Jean-Luc Marion]] * [[William Lane Craig]] * [[:en:Ali Akbar Rashad|Ali Akbar Rashad]] * [[Yujin Nagasawa]] * [[:en:Alexander Pruss|Alexander Pruss]] }}
<!----------------------- Related -------------------------> | list6name = related | list6title = Related topics | list6class = wraplinks | list6 = * [[Criticism of religion]] * [[Ethics in religion]] * [[Exegesis]] * [[Faith and rationality]] * [[History of religion]]s * [[Natural theology]] * [[Relationship between religion and science|Religion and science]] * [[Religious philosophy]] * [[Theology]]
| below = [[Index of philosophy of religion articles|Philosophy of religion article index]]
}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} [[Category:Philosophy and thinking sidebar templates]] </noinclude>

[[Transcendental argument for the existence of God|Transcendental]] | heading2 = Arguments against | content2 = * [[Ultimate Boeing 747 gambit|747 gambit]] * [[Atheist's wager]] * [[Problem of the | heading3 = By religion | content3 = * [[God in Abrahamic religions|Abrahamic]] ** [[God in the Baháʼí Faith|Baháʼí]] ** [[God in Christianity|Christianity]] ** [[God in Islam|Islam]] ** [[God in Judaism|Judaism]] ** [[God in Mormonism|Mormonism]] ** [[Hayyi Rabbi|Mandaeism]] * [[Creator in Buddhism|Buddhism]] * [[God in Hinduism|Hinduism]] * [[God in Jainism|Jainism]] * [[God in Sikhism|Sikhism]] * [[Wiccan views of divinity|Wicca]] }}

the Truthful|Necessary existent]] ** [[Seddiqin argument|Seddiqin]] * [[Nyayakusumanjali]] * [[Occam's razor#Religion|Occam's Razor]] * [[Ontological argument|Ontological]] ** [[Gödel's ontological proof|Gödel]] ** [[Ontological argument#Modal versions of the ontological argument|Modal]] ** [[Proslogion|Anselm]] ** [[Meinongian argument|Meinongian]] ** [[Transcendent theosophy|Mulla Sadra]] ** argument|Trademark]] * [[Transcendental argument for the existence of God|Transcendental]] | heading2 = Arguments against | content2 = * [[Ultimate Boeing 747 gambit|747 gambit]] * [[Atheist's wager]] * [[Problem of the creator of God|Creator of God]] * [[Problem of evil|Evil]] * [[Evil God challenge|Evil God]] * [[Fate of the unlearned]] * [[:en:Argument from free will|Free will]] * [[God of the gaps]] * [[Problem of Hell|Hell]] * [[Hitchens's razor]] * [[Incompatible-properties argument|Incompatible properties]] * [[:en:Argument from inconsistent revelations|{{wrap|Inconsistency}}]] * No limits fallacy * [[Argument from nonbelief|Nonbelief]] * [[Theological noncognitivism|Noncognitivism]] * [[Omnipotence paradox|{{wrap|Omnipotence paradox}}]] * [[Argument from poor design|Poor design]] * [[Russell's teapot]] }}
| heading3 = By religion | content3 = * [[God in Abrahamic religions|Abrahamic]] ** [[God in the Baháʼí Faith|Baháʼí]] ** [[God in Christianity|Christianity]] ** [[God in Islam|Islam]] ** [[God in Judaism|Judaism]] ** [[God in Mormonism|Mormonism]] ** [[Hayyi Rabbi|Mandaeism]] * [[Creator in Buddhism|Buddhism]] * [[God in Hinduism|Hinduism]] * [[God in Jainism|Jainism]] * [[God in Sikhism|Sikhism]] * [[Wiccan views of divinity|Wicca]] }}

design]] * [[Russell's teapot]] }}

<!------------------ Religious concepts -------------------> | list1name = religion | list1title = [[Religion|Religious]] concepts | list1 = * [[Afterlife]] * [[:en:Apophatic theology|Apophatism]] * [[:en:Cataphatic theology|Cataphatism]] * [[Eschatology]] * [[Enlightenment in Buddhism|Enlightenment]] * [[Intelligent design]] * [[Moksha|Liberation]] * [[Miracle]] * [[Mysticism]] * [[Belief#Religion|{{wrap|Religious belief}}]] * [[Reincarnation]] * [[:en:Faith|Religious faith]] * [[Religious text|{{wrap|Scripture (religious text)}}]] * [[Soul]] * [[Vitalism|Spirit]] * [[Theological veto]]
<!---------------------- Challenges -----------------------> | list2name = challenges | list2title = Challenges | list2style = padding-bottom:0;<!--(subsidebar)--> | list2 = {{Sidebar |child |bodystyle={{subsidebar bodystyle}} |navbar=off | headingstyle = background:#e6e6ff;<!--(to complement listtitlestyle above)--> font-weight:normal;<!--(to distinguish from listtitlestyle above)--> | contentstyle = padding:0.15em 0.3em 0.6em;<!--(otherwise too close to headings)--> | content1 = * [[Ethical egoism]] * [[Euthyphro dilemma]] * [[Logical positivism]] * [[Problem of religious language|Religious language]] * [[Verificationism]] ** [[Eschatological verification|eschatological]]
| heading2 = [[Problem of evil]] | content2 = * [[Theodicy]] ** [[Augustinian theodicy|Augustinian]] ** [[Irenaean theodicy|Irenaean]] * [[:en:Best of all possible worlds|{{wrap|Best of all possible worlds}}]] * [[Inconsistent triad]] * [[Natural evil]] }}
<!------------------------- God ---------------------------> | list3name = God | list3title = [[God]] | list3style = padding-bottom:0;<!--(as above; etc)--> | list3 = {{Sidebar |child |bodystyle={{subsidebar bodystyle}} |navbar=off | headingstyle = background:#e6e6ff;font-weight:normal;<!--(as above; etc)--> | contentstyle = padding:0.15em 0.5em 0.6em;<!--(as above; etc)-->
| heading1 = [[Conceptions of God|Conceptions]] | content1 = * [[:en:Anthropopathism|Anthropopathism]] * [[Brahman]] * [[:en:Demiurge|Demiurge]] * [[Divine simplicity|Divinely simple]] * [[Form of the Good]] * [[Holy Spirit]] * [[Misotheism|Maltheist]] * [[Occasionalism]] * [[Pandeism|Pandeist]] * [[Personal god|Personal]] * [[Process theology|Process-theological]] * [[Summum bonum]] * [[Creator deity|Supreme Being]] * [[Unmoved mover]]
| heading2 = [[Existence of God|Existence]] | content2 = {{Sidebar |child |bodystyle={{subsidebar bodystyle}} |navbar=off | headingstyle = <!--background:#eef;-->font-weight:normal; | contentstyle = padding-left:0.4em;padding-right:0.4em; | heading1 = Arguments for | content1 = * [[:en:Argument from beauty|Beauty]] * [[Christological argument|Christological]] ** [[Lewis's trilemma|Trilemma]] ** [[Resurrection of Jesus|Resurrection]] * [[:en:Argument from consciousness|Consciousness]] * [[Cosmological argument|Cosmological]] ** ''[[Kalam cosmological argument|kalām]]'' ** [[Cosmological argument#Argument from contingency|contingency]] ** [[Cosmological argument#Metaphysical argument for the existence of God|metaphysical]] * [[:en:Argument from degree|Degree]] * [[:en:Argument from desire|Desire]] * [[:en:Argument from religious experience|Experience]] * [[Leap of faith|Existential choice]] * [[:en:Fine-tuned universe|Fine-tuned universe]] * [[:en:Argument from love|Love]] * [[Mathematics and God|Mathematics]] * [[:en:Argument from miracles|Miracles]] * [[:en:Argument from morality|Morality]] * [[George Berkeley#Theology|Mystical idealism]] * [[Natural-law argument|Natural law]] * [[Proof of the Truthful|Necessary existent]] ** [[Seddiqin argument|Seddiqin]] * [[Nyayakusumanjali]] * [[Occam's razor#Religion|Occam's Razor]] * [[Ontological argument|Ontological]] ** [[Gödel's ontological proof|Gödel]] ** [[Ontological argument#Modal versions of the ontological argument|Modal]] ** [[Proslogion|Anselm]] ** [[Meinongian argument|Meinongian]] ** [[Transcendent theosophy|Mulla Sadra]] ** [[Baruch Spinoza#Ontological argument|Spinoza]] * [[Pascal's wager]] * [[Reformed epistemology|Proper basis / Reformed epistemology]] * [[:en:Argument from reason|Reason]] * [[Religious responses to the problem of evil|Responses to evil]] * [[Teleological argument|Teleological]] ** [[Intelligent design]] ** [[Watchmaker analogy|Watchmaker]] *** [[Junkyard tornado|Junkyard]] * [[Trademark argument|Trademark]] * [[Transcendental argument for the existence of God|Transcendental]] | heading2 = Arguments against | content2 = * [[Ultimate Boeing 747 gambit|747 gambit]] * [[:en:Atheist's wager|Atheist's wager]] * [[Problem of the creator of God|Creator of God]] * [[Problem of evil|Evil]] * [[Evil God challenge|Evil God]] * [[:en:Fate of the unlearned|Fate of the unlearned]] * [[:en:Argument from free will|Free will]] * [[God of the gaps]] * [[Problem of Hell|Hell]] * [[Hitchens's razor]] * [[Incompatible-properties argument|Incompatible properties]] * [[:en:Argument from inconsistent revelations|{{wrap|Inconsistency}}]] * No limits fallacy * [[:en:Argument from nonbelief|Nonbelief]] * [[Theological noncognitivism|Noncognitivism]] * [[Omnipotence paradox|{{wrap|Omnipotence paradox}}]] * [[:en:Argument from poor design|Poor design]] * [[Russell's teapot]] }}
| heading3 = By religion | content3 = * [[God in Abrahamic religions|Abrahamic]] ** [[God in the Baháʼí Faith|Baháʼí]] ** [[God in Christianity|Christianity]] ** [[God in Islam|Islam]] ** [[God in Judaism|Judaism]] ** [[God in Mormonism|Mormonism]] ** [[Hayyi Rabbi|Mandaeism]] * [[Creator in Buddhism|Buddhism]] * [[God in Hinduism|Hinduism]] * [[God in Jainism|Jainism]] * [[God in Sikhism|Sikhism]] * [[Wiccan views of divinity|Wicca]] }}
<!----------------------- Theories ------------------------> | list4name = theories | list4title = [[Theories about religion|Theories of religion]] | list4 = * [[Acosmism]] * [[Agnosticism]] * [[:en:Animism|Animism]] * [[:en:Antireligion|Antireligion]] * [[:en:Atheism|Atheism]] * [[Creationism]] * [[Dharma|Dharmism]] * [[:en:Deism|Deism]] * [[Divine command theory]] * [[Dualism in cosmology|Dualism]] * [[Western esotericism|Esotericism]] * [[Exclusivism]] * [[Existentialism]] ** [[:en:Atheistic existentialism|atheist]] ** [[Christian existentialism|Christian]] * [[:en:Feminist theology|Feminist]] * [[Fundamentalism]] * [[Gnosticism]] * [[Henotheism]] * [[Humanism]] ** [[Christian humanism|Christian]] ** [[Religious humanism|religious]] ** [[Secular humanism|secular]] * [[Inclusivism]] * [[Monism]] * [[Monotheism]] * [[Mysticism]] * [[Naturalism (philosophy)|Naturalism]] ** [[Humanistic naturalism|humanistic]] ** [[Metaphysical naturalism|metaphysical]] ** [[Religious naturalism|religious]] * [[New Age]] * [[Nonduality (spirituality)|Nondualism]] * [[Nontheism]] * [[Pandeism]] * [[Panentheism]] * [[Pantheism]] * [[Perennial philosophy|Perennialism]] * [[Polytheism]] * [[Process theology|Process]] * [[Secular Shrine Theory]] * [[Shendao shejiao]] * [[Spiritualism (beliefs)|Spiritualism]] * [[Shamanism]] * [[:en:East Asian religions|Taoic]] * [[Theism]] * [[Transcendentalism]]
<!--------------------- Philosophers ----------------------> | list5name = philosophers | list5title = [[:Category:Philosophers of religion|Philosophers of religion]] | list5style = padding-bottom:0; | list5 = {{Sidebar |child |bodystyle={{subsidebar bodystyle}} |navbar=off | headingstyle = background:#e6e6ff;font-weight:normal; | contentstyle = padding:0.1em 1.25em 0.6em; <!-- Check: "[X]ist philosophers" / "[X]ism philosophers" -->
| heading1 = [[:en:Ancient Greek philosophy|Ancient]] and [[Medieval philosophy|medieval]] | content1 = * [[:en:Anselm of Canterbury|Anselm of Canterbury]] * [[Augustine of Hippo]] * [[Avicenna]] * [[Averroes]] * [[Boethius]] * [[Gaudapada]] * [[:en:Al-Ghazali|Al-Ghazali]] * [[Gaunilo of Marmoutiers]] * [[Giovanni Pico della Mirandola|Pico della Mirandola]] * [[Heraclitus]] * [[James VI and I|King James VI and I]] * [[Marcion of Sinope]] * [[Maimonides]] * [[Adi Shankara]] * [[Thomas Aquinas]] * [[William of Ockham]]
| heading2 = [[:en:Early modern philosophy|Early modern]] | content2 = * [[:en:Antoine Augustin Calmet|Augustin Calmet]] * [[René Descartes]] * [[Blaise Pascal]] * [[:en:Desiderius Erasmus|Desiderius Erasmus]] * [[:en:Baruch Spinoza|Baruch Spinoza]] * [[Nicolas Malebranche]] * [[Gottfried Wilhelm Leibniz|Gottfried W Leibniz]] * [[William Wollaston]] * [[Thomas Chubb]] * [[:en:David Hume|David Hume]] * [[:en:Baron d'Holbach|Baron d'Holbach]] * [[Immanuel Kant]] * [[Johann Gottfried Herder|Johann G Herder]]
| heading3 = [[19th-century philosophy|19th-century]] | content3 = * [[Friedrich Schleiermacher]] * [[Karl Christian Friedrich Krause|Karl C F Krause]] * [[Georg Wilhelm Friedrich Hegel|Georg W F Hegel]] * [[Thomas Carlyle]] * [[William Whewell]] * [[Ludwig Feuerbach]] * [[Søren Kierkegaard]] * [[Karl Marx]] * [[:en:Albrecht Ritschl|Albrecht Ritschl]] * [[Afrikan Spir]] * [[Usman dan Fodio]] * [[Ernst Haeckel]] * [[William Kingdon Clifford|W K Clifford]] * [[Friedrich Nietzsche]] * [[Harald Høffding]] * [[William James]] * [[Vladimir Solovyov (philosopher)|Vladimir Solovyov]] * [[Ernst Troeltsch]] * [[Rudolf Otto]] * [[Lev Shestov]] * [[Ernst Cassirer]] * [[Joseph Maréchal]]
| heading5 = [[Contemporary philosophy|Contemporary]] | content5 = * [[George Santayana]] * [[:en:Bertrand Russell|Bertrand Russell]] * [[Martin Buber]] * [[Sergei Bulgakov]] * [[René Guénon]] * [[Paul Tillich]] * [[Karl Barth]] * [[Pavel Florensky]] * [[Emil Brunner]] * [[Rudolf Bultmann]] * [[:en:Gabriel Marcel|Gabriel Marcel]] * [[Reinhold Niebuhr]]
* [[:en:Charles Hartshorne|Charles Hartshorne]] * [[Mircea Eliade]] * [[Frithjof Schuon]] * [[J. L. Mackie]] * [[Walter Kaufmann (philosopher)|Walter Kaufmann]] * [[Martin Lings]] * [[Peter Geach]] * [[George I. Mavrodes|George I Mavrodes]] * [[William Alston]] * [[:en:Antony Flew|Antony Flew]] * [[Kurt Godel]] * [[Graham Oppy]] * [[J. L. Schellenberg]] * [[Paul Draper (philosopher)|Paul Draper]] * [[William L. Rowe|William L Rowe]] * [[Dewi Zephaniah Phillips|Dewi Z Phillips]] * [[:en:Alvin Plantinga|Alvin Plantinga]] * [[:en:Anthony Kenny|Anthony Kenny]] * [[Nicholas Wolterstorff]] * [[Richard Swinburne]] * [[Robert Merrihew Adams]] * [[Ravi Zacharias]] * [[Peter van Inwagen]] * [[Cornel West]] * [[Loyal Rue]] * [[Herman Philipse]] * [[Kai Nielsen (philosopher)|Kai Nielsen]] * [[Jean-Luc Marion]] * [[William Lane Craig]] * [[:en:Ali Akbar Rashad|Ali Akbar Rashad]] * [[Yujin Nagasawa]] * [[:en:Alexander Pruss|Alexander Pruss]] }}
<!----------------------- Related -------------------------> | list6name = related | list6title = Related topics | list6class = wraplinks | list6 = * [[Criticism of religion]] * [[Ethics in religion]] * [[Exegesis]] * [[:en:Faith and rationality|Faith and rationality]] * [[History of religion]]s * [[Natural theology]] * [[Relationship between religion and science|Religion and science]] * [[Religious philosophy]] * [[Theology]]
| below = [[Index of philosophy of religion articles|Philosophy of religion article index]]
}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} [[Category:Philosophy and thinking sidebar templates]] </noinclude>

argument|kalām]]'' ** [[Cosmological argument#Argument from contingency|contingency]] ** [[Cosmological argument#Metaphysical argument for the existence of God|metaphysical]] * [[:en:Argument from degree|Degree]] * [[:en:Argument from desire|Desire]] * [[:en:Argument from religious experience|Experience]] * [[Leap of faith|Existential choice]] * [[:en:Fine-tuned universe|Fine-tuned universe]] * degree|Degree]] * [[:en:Argument from desire|Desire]] * [[:en:Argument from religious experience|Experience]] * [[:en:Leap of faith|Existential choice]] * [[:en:Fine-tuned universe|Fine-tuned
